articles.title: Bank of Canada says Mendes leaving central bank, Kozicki to retire
articles.description: OTTAWA — The Bank of Canada says deputy governor Rhys Mendes is leaving his post at the central bank, while deputy governor Sharon Kozicki will retire later this year.
